title: Real-time ETL Pipeline
description: End-to-end data pipeline ingesting 1M+ events/day using Apache Kafka, Spark Streaming, and dbt transformations into BigQuery.

title: RAG-based Document Q&A
description: GenAI app using LangChain + FAISS vector store to answer questions over private PDFs. Deployed on Streamlit Cloud.

title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive Plotly dashboard with automated refresh, KPI tracking, and drill-down analysis for e-commerce sales data.
